creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text: I've originally updated the port to 3.0 and then 2.0, but they both crash with segfault on startup: something goes wrong in the camera enumeration code, and this needs more investigation.  Right now, I've pushed an update to version 1.0 which uses the same old and working camera detection code, but brings various improvement and also had switched from GNU autotools to Meson -- this makes it a better starting ground for future work, because the next diffs would be less noisy, carrying no build-related hunks.
